description_long: This is a three-tiered utility trolley constructed primarily from metal, featuring a minimalist industrial design. The trolley has three rectangular shelves with raised edges to prevent items from sliding off, supported by a tubular metal frame. Two upright handles extend above the top shelf at either end, providing easy grip for pushing or pulling. Four small caster wheels are attached at the base, allowing for smooth movement across flat surfaces. The trolley is finished in a uniform gray color, giving it a utilitarian and professional appearance suitable for urban environments such as hospitals, offices, or maintenance areas. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its functional purpose.
description: A gray, three-shelf metal trolley with upright handles and four caster wheels, designed for utility and easy mobility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright handle, three shelves, and two visible wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the three shelves, both upright handles, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite handle and two wheels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the three shelves, both handles, and all four wheels.
attribute_handle_type: dual upright handles, tubular metal bars, simple and ergonomic for pushing or pulling
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, one at each corner, likely all swivel for maneuverability
